response.overview: A Mexican couple runs a dangerous smuggling operation, transporting contraband from Jalisco to Tijuana and across the border into Las Vegas. Working together, they build a business fueled by risk, trust, and survival.  But everything begins to unravel when one of their main buyers betrays them, putting their operation and their lives in jeopardy.  As pressure mounts and danger closes in from all sides, the couple must fight to stay alive, protect what they have built, and confront the consequences of the world they chose to enter.
response.title: La Fama De La Pareja
